2606.25990.title: SpeechEQ: Benchmarking Emotional Intelligence Quotient in Socially Aware Voice Conversational Models
2606.25990.paper_summary: As multimodal conversational systems increasingly engage in spoken interaction, their ability to navigate paralinguistic social cues has become a critical bottleneck for natural human-AI communication. However, existing evaluations of machine emotional intelligence assess reasoning exclusively through isolated text or passive acoustic perception, overlooking the complex cross-modal reasoning required for active, multi-turn dialogue. We introduce \textsc{SpeechEQ}, a comprehensive framework designed to evaluate the sociolinguistic reasoning of Speech-Language Models (SLMs). The framework includes a validated dataset of 2,265 dialogues across 15 Emotional Quotient (EQ) subscales grounded in EQ-i 2.0 theory, along with a multi-turn evaluation protocol measured by our proposed Spoken EQ (SEQ) score inspired by human EQ assessments. Experiments show limitations in how both existing Speech Emotion Recognition and end-to-end Speech-Language Models understand and apply paralinguistic cues through speech. While end-to-end architectures outperform cascaded systems, \textsc{SpeechEQ} reveals that current multimodal models remain bottlenecked by a text-reliant ``modality shortcut,'' an alignment-induced ``safety trap,'' and ``contextual amnesia,'' highlighting the barriers to truly emotionally aware AI. Our benchmark can be accessed at https://huggingface.co/datasets/SpeechEQ/SpeechEQ and demo page at https://binomial14.github.io/speecheq-demo/
2606.25990.paper_summary_zh: 隨著多模態對話系統越來越多地參與口語互動，它們在導航副語言社交線索方面的能力已成為自然人機交流的一個關鍵瓶頸。<lb/>然而，現有的機器情感智力評估僅通過孤立的文本或被動的聲學感知來評估推理，忽略了進行主動多輪對話所需的複雜跨模態推理。<lb/>我們介紹了 \textsc{SpeechEQ}，這是一個旨在評估語音語言模型（SLMs）社會語言推理的綜合框架。<lb/>該框架包括一個經過驗證的數據集，涵蓋了基於 EQ-i 2.0 理論的 15 個情感商（EQ）子量表中的 2,265 個對話，以及一個由我們提出的口語 EQ（SEQ）分數測量的多輪評估協議，該分數受到人類 EQ 評估的啟發。<lb/>實驗顯示，現有的語音情感識別和端到端語音語言模型在理解和應用語音中的副語言線索方面存在局限性。<lb/>儘管端到端架構的表現優於級聯系統，\textsc{SpeechEQ} 揭示了當前的多模態模型仍然受到依賴文本的“模態捷徑”、由對齊引起的“安全陷阱”和“上下文健忘”的瓶頸，突顯出真正情感敏感的 AI 所面臨的障礙。<lb/>我們的基準可以在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/SpeechEQ/SpeechEQ 獲得，演示頁面在 https://binomial14.github.io/speecheq-demo/。
2606.25990.author: Liang-Yuan Wu et.al.
2606.25990.authors: Liang-Yuan Wu, Zih-Ching Chen, Tongshuang Wu, Chao-Han Huck Yang, Hua Shen
